package rulecoverage

func NegativeThreeIndexSliceForAppendSafety() string {
    ruleID := "three_index_slice_for_append_safety"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`sub := original[a:b]` followed by `sub = append(sub, ...)` with no capacity bound"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
